AI4U ACADEMY

END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT AND TERMS & CONDITIONS

Artificial Intelligence Education Platform

PREAMBLE AND IDENTIFICATION OF PARTIES

This legal instrument constitutes an End User License Agreement and Terms & Conditions (hereinafter, the "Agreement") entered into between:

LICENSOR: Dr. David Ochoa Resendiz, an individual with business activity, owner of the AI4U Academy platform and brand, domiciled in Cuernavaca, Morelos, Mexico (hereinafter, "AI4U Academy" or the "Licensor").

LICENSEE/USER: The individual or legal entity that accepts these terms at the time of registration, making any payment, or accessing the content and services of the AI4U Academy platform (hereinafter, the "User").

BY COMPLETING THE REGISTRATION PROCESS, MAKING PAYMENT OR ACCESSING ANY CONTENT ON THE PLATFORM, THE USER DECLARES TO HAVE READ, UNDERSTOOD AND FULLY ACCEPTED THIS AGREEMENT. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO ANY PROVISION, YOU MUST REFRAIN FROM USING THE PLATFORM.

CLAUSE ONE. OBJECT OF THE AGREEMENT — USE LICENSE AND INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

1.1 NATURE OF THE AGREEMENT. This instrument regulates the granting of a limited, personal and non-transferable use license over the digital content, teaching materials, videos, recordings, tools, templates, documents and any other resource available on the AI4U Academy platform (collectively, the "Content").

Important Note

LEGAL WARNING: The payment made by the User DOES NOT constitute or imply in any case the sale, assignment, transfer or acquisition of ownership over the Content, the platform, the AI4U Academy brand, or any of the associated intellectual property rights. The User exclusively acquires the right of access and use under the terms established herein.

1.2 INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY. All intellectual property rights over the Content — including copyrights, moral rights, trademarks, trade names, designs, pedagogical methodologies, scripts, audiovisual production, software and databases — are and will remain at all times the exclusive property of the Licensor, protected under the Federal Copyright Law, the Industrial Property Law and other applicable regulations in the United Mexican States.

1.3 SCOPE OF THE LICENSE. The license granted is non-exclusive, non-transferable, personal, revocable and limited to the individual use and consumption of the registered User. It is expressly prohibited to:

  • Share access credentials with third parties.

  • Reproduce, distribute, retransmit or make the Content available to the public by any means.

  • Create derivative works without the Licensor's express written authorization.

  • Use the Content for commercial or third-party training purposes without contracting the corresponding plan.

  • Download, record or capture the Content on any medium without express authorization.

1.4 ACCESS MONITORING. AI4U Academy implements technical session monitoring mechanisms. Simultaneous use of the same account from multiple devices or different locations will be considered a presumption of unauthorized use and may result in immediate suspension of the account.

CLAUSE TWO. LIMITED LIABILITY

2.1 MAXIMUM LIABILITY LIMIT. AI4U Academy's total and maximum liability to the User, for any cause or concept, will be limited in any case to the total amount actually paid by the User for the specific course or product originating the claim. Under no circumstances will the Licensor's liability exceed said amount.

Important Note

IN NO EVENT SHALL AI4U ACADEMY'S LIABILITY EXCEED THE TOTAL AMOUNT PAID BY THE USER FOR THE PRODUCT GIVING RISE TO THE CLAIM. THIS LIMIT IS ABSOLUTE.

2.2 EXEMPTION FOR RESULTS. AI4U Academy does not guarantee specific results in labor, economic or professional matters derived from the use of the acquired knowledge. The results depend exclusively on the effort and particular circumstances of each User.

2.3 EXEMPTION FOR THIRD-PARTY SERVICES. The Content may refer to or integrate third-party tools (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Make, Zapier, ElevenLabs, Microsoft Copilot, among others). AI4U Academy is not responsible for changes in policies, prices, availability or errors of said platforms.

2.4 EXEMPTION FOR FORCE MAJEURE. AI4U Academy will not be liable for interruptions arising from force majeure or fortuitous events, including internet infrastructure failures, power outages, natural disasters, government acts, cyber attacks or other events beyond its reasonable control.

2.5 EXEMPTION FOR AI CONTENT. The User acknowledges that artificial intelligence systems may generate inaccurate or erroneous responses. AI4U Academy will not be responsible for decisions made based on outputs from AI systems, whether inside or outside the platform.

CLAUSE THREE. SERVICE CONTINUITY AND PLATFORM CLOSURE

3.1 CONTINUITY COMMITMENT. AI4U Academy will make its best efforts to maintain the operation of the platform and the availability of the acquired Content, subject to technical interruptions, updates or causes of force majeure. AI4U Academy does not guarantee uninterrupted availability of the service.

3.2 PLATFORM CLOSURE. In the event that AI4U Academy decides to cease its operations or discontinue a product, the Licensor, at its sole discretion and as a gesture of good faith towards its users, will seek to:

  • Communicate to active users the reasons for closure through available channels (email or platform notice).

  • Grant an additional access period of up to ONE (1) YEAR to the acquired Content, to the extent that technical and operational conditions allow.

Important Note

The extended access period following the closure notice is a voluntary benefit from the Licensor and does not constitute an enforceable contractual obligation. AI4U Academy reserves the right to modify or cancel said period depending on operational circumstances.

3.3 MAINTENANCE. Interruptions for maintenance do not generate an obligation of prior notice or responsibility of any kind on the part of the Licensor.

CLAUSE FOUR. PAYMENT POLICY — NO REFUNDS

4.1 FINAL NATURE OF PAYMENT. Given that the Content is digital in nature and access is granted immediately upon payment confirmation, all payments made to AI4U Academy are final and irrevocable.

Important Note

NO REFUNDS WILL BE ISSUED UNDER ANY CIRCUMSTANCES. By making the payment, the User expressly accepts this policy and waives any claim for a refund. This includes, without limitation, cases of dissatisfaction with the content, changes of mind, lack of use of the platform or any other cause.

4.2 CHARGEBACKS. The User agrees not to initiate chargeback procedures or payment reversals with their banking institution or payment platform. In the event that the User makes an unjustified chargeback, AI4U Academy reserves the right to suspend or cancel the account immediately and permanently, as well as to take corresponding legal actions to recover the disputed amount plus associated costs and expenses.

4.3 PRICES. The prices published on the platform at the time of purchase are the applicable ones. AI4U Academy may modify its prices at any time without prior notice for future purchases, without affecting previously contracted access.

CLAUSE FIVE. ACCOUNT SUSPENSION, BLOCKING AND CANCELLATION

5.1 EXCLUSIVE AND DISCRETIONARY POWER. The blocking, temporary suspension or permanent cancellation of an account is an exclusive, unilateral and discretionary power of AI4U Academy. The Licensor fully reserves this right and may exercise it at any time in response to misuse behaviors, without obligation of prior notice or refund.

5.2 MISUSE SCENARIOS. AI4U Academy may suspend or cancel an account, immediately and without liability, in the event of any of the following behaviors:

  • Sharing access credentials with third parties or allowing account use by individuals other than the registered User.

  • Reproducing, distributing, publishing or commercializing the Content without the Licensor's authorization.

  • Attempting to access or extract Content using automated tools, bots, scrapers or other unauthorized mechanisms.

  • Reverse engineering the platform, its systems or technology.

  • Using the platform for illegal, fraudulent, harassing activities or those contrary to Mexican legislation.

  • Initiating unjustified chargebacks or payment reversals.

  • Providing false information at the time of registration or during platform use.

  • Any other conduct that threatens the integrity of the platform, other users or the Licensor's rights.

5.3 EFFECTS OF BLOCKING. Account cancellation for misuse implies: immediate and permanent loss of access to the Content, without the right to a refund of any amount paid, prohibition to create new accounts on the platform, and reservation by the Licensor to take corresponding civil and criminal actions.

5.4 LICENSOR'S JUDGMENT. AI4U Academy is the final arbiter in determining what constitutes misuse. The blocking decision is unappealable within the platform, without prejudice to legal resources the User may exercise before competent authorities.

CLAUSE SIX. PRIVACY AND PERSONAL DATA PROTECTION

6.1 AI4U Academy collects and processes User personal data in compliance with the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties (LFPDPPP). Processing is governed by the Privacy Notice published on the platform, which forms an integral part of this Agreement.

6.2 ARCO RIGHTS. The User may exercise their rights of Access, Rectification, Cancellation and Opposition via request to AI4U Academy's official email. The response will be issued within the timeframes established by the LFPDPPP.

6.3 DATA USE. AI4U Academy may use User usage and progress data for platform improvement purposes, internal statistics and communications related to the contracted service.

CLAUSE SEVEN. MODIFICATIONS TO THE AGREEMENT

7.1 AI4U Academy reserves the right to modify, update or replace this Agreement at any time, at its sole discretion. Modifications will take effect on the date of their publication on the platform, without the need for individual prior notice to the User.

7.2 Continued use of the platform after the publication of modifications will imply tacit and immediate acceptance of the new terms. It is the User's exclusive responsibility to periodically review this Agreement. If the User does not agree with the modifications, they must stop using the platform.

CLAUSE EIGHT. APPLICABLE LAW AND JURISDICTION

8.1 This Agreement is governed in all its terms by the laws in force in the United Mexican States, including the Federal Copyright Law, the Industrial Property Law, the Federal Consumer Protection Law and the Federal Law on Protection of Personal Data Held by Private Parties.

8.2 For the interpretation and fulfillment of this Agreement, the parties expressly submit to the jurisdiction of the competent courts based in Cuernavaca, Morelos, Mexico, waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them.

CLAUSE NINE. GENERAL PROVISIONS

9.1 INTEGRATION. This Agreement, along with the Privacy Notice and specific product policies, constitutes the entire agreement between the parties, superseding any prior agreement on the same matter.

9.2 PARTIAL INVALIDITY. If any provision is declared invalid by a competent authority, the remaining provisions will remain in full force.

9.3 NO WAIVER. The fact that AI4U Academy does not exercise any right provided in this Agreement will not imply a waiver of it.

9.4 INTERPRETATION. In case of doubt or ambiguity in the interpretation of this Agreement, the interpretation that most favors the interests of the Licensor will prevail, in its capacity as owner of the rights subject to this instrument.

DECLARATION OF ACCEPTANCE

By registering, making a payment or accessing AI4U Academy Content, the User declares:

  • To have read, understood and fully accepted this Agreement.

  • To be of legal age or have authorization from their legal representative.

  • That the registration information provided is true and updated.

  • That platform use is strictly personal and non-transferable.

  • To know and expressly accept the no-refund policy established in Clause Four.

  • To know and accept the discretionary blocking power established in Clause Five.

Cuernavaca, Morelos, Mexico

Version 2.0 — Effective upon publication on the platform

Dr. David Ochoa Resendiz
